title: More Than Ores!
description: An Addon to More Than Biomes!
body:
![One of the most valuable ores!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5271dc2b0fcffe9ccb693c386fd98f4569ba1bd5.png)
  
  This is an addon to More Than Biomes! This mod adds several new ores, like Benitoite ore and Apatite ore and adamite ore! And adds some mad up ores like Tangerine ore, in the future this mod will add more biomes to caves and more ores. This mod already has over 200 features to add to Minecraft! Most ores also have their own deepslate varients! This mod should work with other mods and I hope you enjoy using it! Oh yeah, this mod has over 8 new ores and tools and armor sets!

![Another important ore!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58683cd05200c17046d4840e121ea1919e80185a.png)
you may use this mod in your modpacks
